scope: Cycle 8: encounter_card_overlay.gd v2 (cinematic CRT/PSX presentation), screen_dither_layer.gd (set_color_levels fix)

bugs_found.description: minigame.start() never called after add_child(minigame) — minigames created but UI never built, game_completed never emitted, card overlay hangs on await
bugs_found.fix: Added minigame.start() call after add_child(minigame) in _on_choice()

bugs_found.description: set_color_levels() always sets 'color_levels' param but PSX shader uses 'color_depth'. Harmless (param ignored) but incorrect.
bugs_found.fix: Route to correct param based on _render_mode (PSX -> color_depth, CRT -> color_levels)

overall_assessment: Cycle 8: 1 HIGH + 1 LOW bug fixed. Encounter card overlay rewritten with cinematic CRT/PSX presentation. 23 total bugs fixed across 8 cycles.
